free_text: on scandium, vanadium, cobalt, copper and zinc isotope
Part of the data were published. ERR-ANALYSIS was given
110 keV deuterons. Neutron energy versus angular
position of the sample with respect to the deuteron-
beam direction was determined by measuring the ration
of the Zr-89 to Nb-92-m specific activities produced
both in the Zr and Nb foils by (n,2n) reactions.
Corrections have been made for dead time loss, coin-
cidence effects, detector efficiency and gamma
self-absorption of gamma rays in sample - 0.5%
plus errors described in ERR-1 to ERR-4.
Data were taken from tables 1 and 2 of 'Interna
Conference on Nuclear Data for Science and Technology,
Year corrected on 4-digit. BIB added REF
